title: analysis_results.tsv row — WHAT-OUT
description:
One row per analysis run. Records WHICH inputs (sample / group / interval / site / input_value), WHICH method, and WHERE the output lives. Downstream tools (ngsPedigree consuming an ngsRelate .res, mendelian consuming a pedigree) reference this row's result_id as their upstream input.

The contract: a row is VALID only if every FK resolves AND the three-way input_value contract (samples × sites × interval) holds. scripts/check_result_contract.py runs that validation; scripts/register_result.py refuses to add a row that fails it.

path.description: Path to the output file (.res, pedigree.tsv, mendelian.tsv, .qopt, …).

group_set_id.description: FK into group_sets.tsv. Empty when not applicable.

site_set_id.description: FK into site_sets.tsv. Empty for analyses that don't expose site granularity.

input_value_id.description: FK into input_values.tsv (e.g. the BEAGLE the analysis read). For analyses that consume an upstream RESULT (ngsPedigree on an ngsRelate .res), use input_result_id instead.

input_result_id.description: FK into analysis_results.tsv when the input is another analysis's output.

params_id.description: Optional FK or tag identifying the run params.
